name: Enhanced Security Requirements for Protecting CUI
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-172 provides enhanced security requirements supplementing 800-171 — for use when CUI is high-value information or when nonfederal organizations face advanced persistent threats. Often required by DoD CMMC Level 3.
relationToCloudSecurity: Higher-tier counterpart to 800-171 for cloud customers serving high-value defense workloads.
relationToAISecurity: Same as 800-171 — applies to AI systems processing high-value CUI.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

lifecycle.notes: Rev 2 Initial Public Draft 2024. Rev 1 was 2021.

current_extraction.notes: Source PDF from NIST CSRC, marker-extracted to markdown. extract_800_172.py parses the 35 enhanced security requirements (formatted as [3.X.Ne]) into structured CSV/JSON, grouped by 10 of the 14 SP 800-53 families (3.1, 3.2, 3.4, 3.5, 3.6, 3.9, 3.11, 3.12, 3.13, 3.14).

notes: Metadata stub; acquire from NIST CSRC and extract.
